---
description: "Rules for writing validation test case specifications (VTC IDs)."
applyTo: "doc/validation/**/tcs/**/*.md"
---

# Validation TCS authoring rules

- Use stable `VTC-####` IDs; never reuse IDs.
- Every `VTC-*` must validate at least one `VREQ-*`.
- Include a traceability matrix (VTC → VREQ).
